content: Deploy project into /app (backend+frontend), preserve env, install deps, services running
Verify test bypasses removed (test@customer.com) — confirmed already removed
Build Customer 2FA management block in CustomerCabinet Account Security (enable wizard w/ QR, verify, backup codes, disable, regenerate)
Add i18n EN/BG/UK keys for all customer 2FA UI
Test full customer 2FA flow end-to-end (testing agent - frontend)
Final production readiness verification (health, workers, smoke test)
